channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Etomidate Injection (65219-445-10)
item.description: Etomidate, Injection, 2 mg/1 mL (NDC 65219-445-10) Status: Current Updated: 2026-06-10 Company: Caplin Steriles, Ltd. Check wholesalers for inventory; Marketed by Fresenius Kabi
